rows.statement: Command ids, command meaning, capability binding, and availability belong to the command kernel layer.
UI surfaces may show or hide commands, but do not authorize command execution.
Approved command execution must pass through the command bus or command kernel entry path.
Known bypass routes remain denied by B2C10 and must not be reopened by Block 3.
Command effects keep validate, apply, operation plan, and persist boundaries explicit.
Persist effects remains the only write layer for storage-side command effects.
Block 3 does not create an executable plugin runtime.
Block 3 admission does not claim release readiness.
